docs.title: PRAO of Julian
docs.text:
• When: Wednesday November 26th 2025 9:00-16:00 (see schedule)
  • Where in Uppsala: Biomedical Center, Husargatan: see location how to get there
  • Where in BMC: office B9:430b: see office how to get there
  • Schedule: see schedule
  • Report: see report
  • Reflection: see reflection
  • Reflection from supervisor: see Reflection from supervisor
  • Tips from previous interns

docs.title: Goal
docs.text: To find out how working life at NBIS/UPPMAX/UU is like.

docs.title: Project
docs.text: To be discussed in the first hour.

docs.title: Contact me
docs.text:
Contact me at

  • the email address shown at my GitHub account
  • by calling 079-3599417

docs.title: What should I bring?
docs.text:
• a laptop
  • (optional) food

docs.title: Where in Uppsala is this?
docs.text: At the Biomedical Center, Husargatan. See location how to get there.

docs.title: Where in the Biomedical Center must I be?
docs.text: At office D5:514c. See office how to get there

docs.title: Are there microwaves to heat my lunch food?
docs.text: Yes.

docs.title: What happens when I am late?
docs.text: You will make a bad first impression and the PRAO will end later.

docs.title: Location
docs.text:
We meet at the Biomedical Center in Uppsala at the Husargatan:

At BMC, we will meet at my office. See my office how to get there.

docs.title: Office
docs.text:
The office has room number D5:514c and can be found here (in Mazemap).

To reach my office, enter BMC at entrance C11:

BMC has another entrance (see below). Use C11.

After entering BMC entrance C11, in the hallways, take the stairs down.

Enter at entrance C11. In the hallways, take the stairs down

In the basement, turn right and follow the long corridor until the third square. You will see 'C5' painted in huge letters at the wall of the staircase.

turn right and follow the loooong corridor until the third 'square' Take the elevator or stairs to floor 5.

When arriving at the fifth floor, there are four easy chairs. We will meet there :-)

docs.title: Reflection
docs.text:
The goal of a reflection is to improve.

One does so writing down how a passed day went: what did yo do, how did it go and how can it be improved?

By forcing oneself to think of this, one can actually learn from the past.

docs.title: What did you do?
docs.text: I lernd and read about HTML

docs.title: What did you do well?
docs.text: i dindent give up

docs.title: What could be improved?
docs.text: I coud talk lees in the start and start working i think i whod have a lot more done i did that but i still think i lernd some new stuff

docs.title: What did your supervisor do well?
docs.text: He explaned well and understand why i dident understand

docs.title: How can your supervisor be improved?
docs.text: i dont know

docs.title: What would you do differently next time?
docs.text: I think that i whodent do enything difrent becuse i think i did good today for the skill i have

docs.title: Which tip would you give to future PRAO students?
docs.text: i dont know

docs.title: What I did well
docs.text: I treated my PRAOs as real colleagues. I gave them a real job to do.

docs.title: What I could do better
docs.text: I am unsure how well I handled two PRAOs: how to make both feel useful.

docs.title: My conclusion about my PRAO
docs.text: Julian was a good PRAO. He tried his best, even though it may not have been easy on him: he is not yet very experienced as a programmer (which is no problem) but he may have felt bad about himself due to this unnecessarily. He was polite, hardworking and I definitely recommend him to all other future PRAO handledare.

docs.title: Goal
docs.text:
This paragraph is written by the supervisor

The scoreto R package fails. scoreto is an R package that scrapes several websites to create the SCoRe user documentation 'Courses' page.

Fix scoreto

  • [ ] Make an account at Posix Cloud
  • [ ] Start Posix Cloud
  • [ ] Click 'Create', then select 'Create from online git repository'
  • [ ] In Posix Cloud, run the tests. There will be some that will fail
  • [ ] In Posix Cloud, work on the branch called develop

Find out why the tests fail. Do not touch the tests. Fix the code. If all tests pass, you have succeeded.

docs.title: Steps
docs.text:
First hour (11:00): We are trying to find the weebssite which has an incorrectly formated date. Second hour (13.00) So far we have figerd out what the issue is (the date it falsely formated) and with weebsite it is. We are asking chat gpt for ansers.

Julian: Today ive lernd about the basics of crating a weebsite and the structure of a weebsite. i have bin trying to help some with the problem but i dident have much skill in the matter of the thing so i cudent but i think it was fun to prao here today and thanks for having me. /julian :)

docs.title: Schedule
docs.text: Start What 9:00 Be at Richel's office B9:430b . Get coffee/tea/chocolate milk . Discuss goal of PRAO . Discuss project of PRAO . Discuss method of achieving goal: report and reflection . Log in PRAO student (if needed) . Discuss practical things (a.o. access card, toilet) 10:00 Break 10:15 Work on project 11:00 Break 11:15 Work on project 12:00 Break 12:15 Work on project 13:00 Break 13:15 Work on project 14:00 Break 14:15 Work on project 15:00 Break 15:15 Work on project, finalize report 15:30 write down reflection and reflection from supervisor 15:45 Discuss reflection 16:00 Done

docs.title: Tips from former students
docs.text:
Tips from former students, with spelling errors corrected.

Stay calm and focused and you will get it done, even if it feels stressful you'll get it done in the end. Remember the goal of a PRAO. The start is the hardest, it gets easier.

Emil

Make sure to get a good idea of what to do before starting so that you don't lose time due to misunderstanding the assignment.

Frans

Listen carefully to the explanations when you're given them. If you lose focus important information could be lost on you, and if you simply listen and take your time processing the info, a lot of issues can be avoided.

Noah

Take time to think through and plan the assignments beforehand so you have more time to spend writing and doing the assignment.

Johannes

Do your best! Don't give up, it might be hard at first but it gets better. Just belive in yourself and you will make it!

Signe

Ask the supervisor for extensive instructions

Olle

PLEASE ask questions when you don't understand. Don't ask the stupid AI, instead ask the smart human who is next to you at almost all the time: he knows better than AI trust me ;)

Max

Don't be shy to ask questions and don't have any distractions

Roza
